_meta.description: Machine-readable version of all 43 audit checklist items from references/checklist.md.
_meta.usage: Cross-reference with stages.json for active items and profiles.json for skip/substitute items.
_meta.scoring: PASS=1.0, PARTIAL=0.5, FAIL=0.0. dimension_score = (sum / count) * 100. final = sum(dim_score * weight).

auto_detect.pass: File exists and < 150 lines
auto_detect.partial: File exists but > 500 lines or < 10 lines

auto_detect.pass: docs/ exists with subdirectories and index file
auto_detect.partial: docs/ exists but flat or no index

auto_detect.pass: Architecture doc with domain boundaries and dependency rules
auto_detect.partial: Some architectural notes exist but incomplete

auto_detect.check: Agent instruction file is a TOC with pointers to deeper docs
auto_detect.pass: Entry point < 150 lines with explicit links to deeper docs
auto_detect.partial: Some layering but navigation unclear
auto_detect.fail: Monolithic file or no structured navigation

auto_detect.pass: Design docs and ADRs in repo
auto_detect.partial: Some docs in-repo but key decisions outside

auto_detect.pass: CI runs on every PR with required status checks
auto_detect.partial: CI exists but doesn't block merges

auto_detect.pass: Linter runs in CI and blocks
auto_detect.partial: Linter configured but not in CI

auto_detect.pass: Formatter runs in CI and blocks
auto_detect.partial: Formatter configured but not in CI

auto_detect.content_check: Type checker in CI; strict mode indicators
auto_detect.pass: Type checker runs in CI and blocks (strict mode)
auto_detect.partial: Type checking exists but permissive

auto_detect.check: Custom linter rules or structural tests enforcing import direction
auto_detect.pass: Custom rules enforce dependency direction in CI
auto_detect.partial: Rules documented but not mechanically enforced

auto_detect.check: Custom lint messages contain fix instructions
auto_detect.pass: Errors include specific remediation steps
auto_detect.partial: Some helpful messages but most generic

auto_detect.check: Naming, file size, import restrictions via lint or CI
auto_detect.pass: At least 2 conventions enforced via lint or CI
auto_detect.partial: Conventions documented but not enforced

auto_detect.check: grep for logging framework imports (winston, pino, loguru, slog, tracing, etc.)
auto_detect.pass: Structured logging framework with consistent patterns
auto_detect.partial: Mixed structured and unstructured logging

auto_detect.check: grep for OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, metrics packages
auto_detect.pass: Metrics and/or tracing configured
auto_detect.partial: Basic metrics but tracing absent

auto_detect.check: Can agents query logs/metrics via CLI, APIs, or local interfaces?
auto_detect.pass: Agents can access data programmatically
auto_detect.partial: Data exists but requires manual dashboard

auto_detect.check: grep for Playwright, Puppeteer, CDP, Cypress config
auto_detect.pass: Browser automation configured and agents can screenshot/inspect
auto_detect.partial: Some UI testing exists but agents can't use it

auto_detect.check: Error handling patterns: stack traces, relevant state, suggested fixes
auto_detect.pass: Errors include context and suggested fixes
auto_detect.partial: Standard error handling but lacks diagnostic context

auto_detect.pass: Tests across multiple layers
auto_detect.partial: Some tests but very low coverage

items.name: Tests Run in CI and Block

auto_detect.check: Test command in CI config as required check
auto_detect.pass: Tests are required check; PRs cannot merge with failures
auto_detect.partial: Tests run but don't block

auto_detect.check: Coverage threshold config (--cov-fail-under, coverageThreshold, etc.)
auto_detect.pass: Thresholds configured and enforced in CI
auto_detect.partial: Coverage measured but no thresholds

auto_detect.pass: Feature list in machine-readable format with pass/fail
auto_detect.partial: Done criteria in human-readable form

auto_detect.content_check: E2E framework in dependencies and CI
auto_detect.pass: E2E suite exists and runs in CI
auto_detect.partial: Some E2E tests but not comprehensive or not in CI

auto_detect.check: Retry config, quarantine labels, flake tracking
auto_detect.pass: Flakes tracked, quarantined, or retried with monitoring
auto_detect.partial: Some awareness but not systematic
auto_detect.fail: Flakes routinely block or silently ignored

auto_detect.pass: Key decisions documented in-repo
auto_detect.partial: Some externalized but gaps remain

auto_detect.check: Doc freshness CI job, doc-gardening agent, expiry metadata
auto_detect.pass: Automated freshness checks
auto_detect.partial: Manual review exists but inconsistent

auto_detect.pass: llms.txt or curated reference docs available
auto_detect.partial: Some references but incomplete
auto_detect.fail: Agents must fetch external docs with no local guidance

auto_detect.check: Stack uses well-documented, composable tools agents can reason about
auto_detect.pass: Stable, widely-known technologies; minimal custom abstractions
auto_detect.partial: Mostly standard but some opaque dependencies
auto_detect.fail: Heavy reliance on obscure or undocumented frameworks

auto_detect.check: AGENTS.md line count, structured state files, artifact directories
auto_detect.pass: AGENTS.md < 150 lines; structured state files; artifact dirs
auto_detect.partial: Some externalization but AGENTS.md bloated (>300 lines)
auto_detect.fail: Monolithic instruction files; no structured state

auto_detect.check: grep for 'principles', 'golden rules', conventions in AGENTS.md or docs/
auto_detect.pass: Principles documented and referenced from agent instructions
auto_detect.partial: Some principles exist but not connected to agent workflows

auto_detect.check: Scheduled cleanup jobs, refactoring agent config, quality PRs
auto_detect.pass: Automated or scheduled cleanup
auto_detect.partial: Ad-hoc cleanup but not systematic

auto_detect.content_check: File has meaningful content (not just placeholder)
auto_detect.pass: Quality scores or tech-debt-tracker maintained
auto_detect.partial: Tracking via TODO comments or issue labels

auto_detect.check: Lint rules targeting duplicate utilities, dead code, AI-generated patterns
auto_detect.pass: Lint rules or review patterns target common AI slop
auto_detect.partial: General review catches some but nothing AI-specific

auto_detect.pass: Documented strategy with templates
auto_detect.partial: Informal decomposition

auto_detect.pass: Structured progress notes maintained across sessions
auto_detect.partial: Git commit messages as only progress record

auto_detect.check: Descriptive commits + progress logs + feature status
auto_detect.pass: Complete handoff: commits + logs + status
auto_detect.partial: Some handoff info but significant orientation needed

auto_detect.pass: Init script boots environment with health checks
auto_detect.partial: Setup instructions exist but require manual steps

auto_detect.check: Clean state expectation documented in AGENTS.md or contributing guide
auto_detect.pass: Documented; each session commits clean, tested code
auto_detect.partial: Implicitly expected but not enforced

auto_detect.pass: Structured checkpoints + recovery script + documented protocol
auto_detect.partial: Some progress tracking but no formal recovery
auto_detect.fail: No progress persistence; interruptions mean restart

auto_detect.check: Agent tokens scoped to minimum permissions
auto_detect.pass: Tokens scoped to minimum required permissions
auto_detect.partial: Some scoping but broader than needed
auto_detect.fail: Full admin credentials or not addressed

auto_detect.check: PRs, deployments, config changes logged with timestamps
auto_detect.pass: Actions logged with timestamps and attribution
auto_detect.partial: Some logging but incomplete

auto_detect.check: Rollback playbook or automated scripts
auto_detect.pass: Documented rollback playbook or scripts
auto_detect.partial: Rollback possible but ad-hoc

auto_detect.check: Approval gates for destructive operations in CI/deployment config
auto_detect.pass: DB migrations, deploys, force pushes require confirmation
auto_detect.partial: Some gates but incomplete
auto_detect.fail: Agents can perform destructive ops without approval

auto_detect.content_check: Security-sensitive paths have stricter review requirements
auto_detect.pass: Critical files marked with stricter review
auto_detect.partial: Some awareness but no explicit marking
auto_detect.fail: No distinction between critical and regular code

auto_detect.check: MCP configs scoped, tool output treated as untrusted, audit trail
auto_detect.pass: MCP scoped to minimum permissions; output untrusted; audit trail
auto_detect.partial: Some MCP config but broad permissions
